name: 道の駅 とうごう
desc: 歌人・若山牧水生誕の地にある道の駅。純日向産そば粉100%の「牧水そば」が名物で、東郷総合支所・公民館も併設。
descEn: In the birthplace of poet Bokusui Wakayama. Known for 'Bokusui soba' made entirely from Hyuga-grown buckwheat, and also houses the Togo branch government office and community hall.

name: 道の駅 日向
desc: 日豊海岸国定公園内、太平洋を望む国道10号沿いの道の駅。郷土芸能「日向ひょっとこ踊り」で知られ、へべす・日向夏ソフトクリームが名物。
descEn: Along Route 10 in Hyuga-kaigan Quasi-National Park, overlooking the Pacific. Known for the traditional Hyotokko folk dance, plus hebesu citrus and Hyuga natsu orange soft-serve.
